title: ChainSwap - REKT
relevance_summary: Cross-chain bridge exploit involving multiple repeated transactions to mint tokens and sell them for profit

prevention.rule: Block any tx that repeatedly calls minting functions on bridge contracts within a short timeframe

red_flags: Large volume of small ETH transactions
summary: The attacker exploited the ChainSwap bridge by repeatedly minting tokens and selling them for profit, resulting in a loss of $4.4 million. A guard could have detected this by blocking repeated minting calls within a short timeframe.
